productDisplayName: Span Women Floral Printed Pink Kurta
description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Pink floral printed kurta with a solid pink panel on the left from underarms to the hemline, has a decorative embroidered design above the hemline on the left, panel above the hemline in the front with stitched detailing, side slits, round neckline and short sleeves with panelling at the cuffs Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
